title: Satru Mun Kidaitha Song Lyrics Sinthamal Sitharamal
stanzas: <div>Satru Mun Kidaitha Thagaval Padi Song Lyrics Sinthamal Sitharamal

Satru mun kidaitha
thagaval padi
tholaindhu ponathu
en idhayamadi
uyire en uyire en uyire uyire(2)

uttru paarkum vidham
purinthathadi
ilamai siragadithu
paranthadhadi
uyire en uyire en uyire uyire

maaligaiyaai malar maaligaiyaai
un manadhinai alangarippen
devi undhan kangalil
naan thinasari avatharippen

theeviramaai thinam theeviramai
un thaedalai anumadhippen
theendum nernthidum
un thavarugal anusarippen

mudhal naal enai theettinaai
marunaal uyir poottinaai
sanga tamizh pola un manam
sangamikkum podhu santhanam

Yaathiraigal en yaathiraigal
un vizhigalil nigazhgirathe
aasai kaetkum kelvigal
ada nanbagal kulirgirathe

raathirigal en raathirigal
miga ragasiyam aagirathe
naalum pookkum niyabagam
ada vanmurai pesiyathe

vanga kadal eeram pogumaa
indha pudhir kaadhal aagumaa
imai moodaamal
irai thaedaamal
un uravaal uyirthiruppen.

Satru mun kidaitha
thagaval padi
tholaindhu ponathu
en idhayamadi
uyire en uyire en uyire uyire

uttru paarkum vidham
purinthathadi
ilamai siragadithu
paranthadhadi
uyire en uyire en uyire uyire

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Satru Mun Kidaitha expresses deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the struggles of the heart.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Sinthamal Sitharamal, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the protagonist's emotional journey.

Who is the singer of the song?

The song is sung by Harish Ragavendra, known for his soulful voice and emotive singing style.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music director for this song is unknown, adding an air of mystery to its creation.

When was the song released?

Satru Mun Kidaitha was released on January 30, 2004.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Satru Mun Kidaitha, the protagonist grapples with the complexities of love, as expressed through poignant lyrics and a haunting melody. The song encapsulates the feelings of yearning and emotional turmoil, making it a relatable anthem for those experiencing heartbreak. Its soothing composition and heartfelt delivery evoke a sense of nostalgia and reflection. Overall, this track serves as a beautiful reminder of the bittersweet nature of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Satru Mun Kidaitha from Sinthamal Sitharamal is a soulful melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Harish Ragavendra's enchanting vocals, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet emotions of romance. Dive into this beautiful track that perfectly blends heartfelt lyrics with a captivating tune.
stanzaMeanings: Before the enemy, my heart has lost its way, oh my life, my life, my life.
The way I look at you has changed, youth has taken flight, oh my life, my life, my life.
Without changing my state, I will remain at your feet.
Like a palace, like a flower palace, I will adorn your heart, goddess, I will descend into your eyes.
With intensity, I will seek you every day, I will follow your footsteps without fail.
From the first day, you have captured me, you have given me life, like Tamil poetry, your heart will unite with mine.
Without losing my identity, I will remain in your thoughts.
My journeys are reflected in your eyes, the questions of desire arise, oh, friendships bloom.
My nights are very secretive, even the days remember, don't speak of the past.
How many times have I seen this, how many times have I felt this?
Will the sea of love flow, will this new love blossom, without losing its essence, I will live through our bond.
Before the enemy, my heart has lost its way, oh my life, my life, my life.
The way I look at you has changed, youth has taken flight, oh my life, my life, my life.
Without changing my state, I will remain at your feet.
